title: stellaria alsine var. alpina
intro: Stellaria alsine var. alpina, also known as Alpine Starwort or Alpine Chickweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor burns. The health benefits of Stellaria alsine var. alpina include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
